== Notes for [[Item:Q3341|Q3341]] ==

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-D708/type/fa/id/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149/unitid/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149+-+ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-6040762/search/0/de+Castro+y+Polanco

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/6040762

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAE8C0A1EFBBFA9822EF79916C6CA7
geni:6000000076909823844
